programs.title: Ainda Estou Aqui
programs.desc: Brazil, 1971. A military dictatorship is gaining strength in the country, and the lives of citizens are disrupted by detentions, disappearances and acts of violence.In these dangerous times, the Paiva family tries to live a peaceful life in Rio de Janeiro.Everything changes when one day the family patriarch, Rubens (Selton Mello), a former congressman, is summoned for a mysterious interrogation by military investigators.Soon, the officers arrest Eunice Paiva (Fernanda Torres), the mother of the family.She is kept in prison for 12 days and put under pressure to hand over her friends and associates accused of opposition activities.The traumatic experience becomes the beginning of Eunice's profound transformation.After leaving prison, she is forced to find herself again - she fights for the truth as an activist.Its goal is to expose the government's illegal actions and fight for justice for thousands of victims of the regime.

programs.title: Arrival
programs.desc: Spaceships land in twelve different places on Earth.No one knows why the aliens chose these locations.The American military is trying to solve the mystery.For this purpose, the soldiers build a camp next to one of the mysterious objects.A talented linguist, Dr. Louise Banks, is called there.Together with Colonel G.T.Weber and physicist Ian Donnelly tries to find out what the real intentions of aliens are and determine whether humanity is in danger from them.Soon, Louise is sent to a spaceship to talk to representatives of an alien civilization.He must unravel the rules of the newcomers' language.He realizes that time plays a key role in the mysterious message.

programs.title: Barry
programs.desc:
Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root
Barry, a hitman from the Midwest, is transferred by Fuches to Los Angeles for acting workshops taught by guru Gene Cousineau.Barry plays the role of an absent acting student.After classes, he goes to a bar with his new friends to strengthen relationships.Over time, he begins to become fascinated with the stage and performances.Soon, one of the course participants, Sally Reed, catches the man's eye.The workshop leader allows Barry to join the group.But first he must perform a monologue in front of everyone.

programs.title: Barry
programs.desc: Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root.

programs.title: You're Cordially Invited
programs.desc: A booking error causes two weddings to take place in one place at the same time.Both families face the challenge of having to share space.However, they have no intention of letting anything stop them from organizing a special ceremony for their loved one.Jim (Will Ferrell), the father of Jenni (Geraldine Viswanathan), who is getting ready to get married, and Margot (Reese Witherspoon), the sister of the second bride, Neve (Meredith Hagner), try to maintain their composure in a difficult situation, but they are still fighting a desperate duel with each other.A comedy directed by Nicholas Stoller, the creator of "Neighbors".

programs.title: Across the Universe
programs.desc: 1960s.Young Briton Jude (Jim Sturgess) goes to the United States in search of his father, whom he has never known before.The man is said to be a university lecturer.However, he turns out to be an ordinary worker.There, Jude meets a teenage American girl, Lucy (Evan Rachel Wood).They both fall in love with each other at first sight.Soon, Lucy's brother, Max (Joe Anderson), is drafted and goes to war in Vietnam.Meanwhile, Jude and Lucy, along with a group of friends and musicians, engage in anti-war activities.Their guides are: Dr. Robert (Bono) and Mr. Kite (Eddie Izzard).Together they fight for freedom of speech and civil rights.However, the tense situation is not favorable for lovers.Adversity tears them apart.They have to overcome many obstacles to be together again.The film's soundtrack included several songs by the legendary band The Beatles.The film was nominated for a Golden Globe (Best Musical) and an Oscar (Best Costume Design).
